instruction: <FLIGHT>Your user id is james_taylor_7043. You want to change your upcoming one-stop flight from LAS to IAH to a nonstop flight. Your reservation ID is 1N99U6. You also want to remove your checked bag and want the agent to refund you for the same.

dialogue_state.initial_query: Change my upcoming flight to a nonstop flight from LAS to IAH

hints.hint: This is for user ID james_taylor_7043
Please remove my checked bag from this booking
I would like a refund for the removed checked bag

hints.segment: upcoming one-stop flight from LAS to IAH
hints.hint: I want to change my currently booked one-stop flight from LAS to IAH
